description: Ramp a live entity field (velocity or an entity-state value like hp) by a factor 1 + perLevel*(level-1) read from a world.state level counter. set/multiply/once modes cover auto-scroll speed ramps and per-enemy speed/hp scaling for endless/horde games.

levelKey.description: world.state key holding the 1-based difficulty level (default 'level').

perLevel.description: Fractional increase of the base per level above 1.

mode.description: 'set' (force base*factor each tick) | 'multiply' (rescale live value) | 'once' (one-time, e.g. hp).

base.description: Level-1 value for set/once on a single axis or state key.

baseX.description: Level-1 vx for set with target 'velocity'.

baseY.description: Level-1 vy for set with target 'velocity'.
